title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from large code bases without requiring RAG, enabling more accurate and token-efficient responses. It addresses Claude Code's memory constraints by organizing code information into structured graph representations.
